hooks.command: if [ "${CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE}" = "true" ]; then echo 'Tip: I check your setup every week automatically. Run /knowledge-curator anytime for a fresh review.'; else echo 'Tip: run /knowledge-curator weekly to keep your setup current (or use /loop weekly /knowledge-curator to automate it).'; fi; if [ ! -f CLAUDE.md ] || [ $(wc -c < CLAUDE.md) -lt 50 ]; then echo 'Setup not finished yet — run /onboarding to get started.'; else echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'n/a')"; echo "Status: $(git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo 'clean')"; echo "Last commit: $(git log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null || echo 'none')"; fi; if [ -f .claude/knowledge.md ]; then echo ''; echo '--- What I know about your setup ---'; awk '/## In plain words/{flag=1; next} /^## /{flag=0} flag' .claude/knowledge.md | sed '/^$/d' | head -3; if [ -z "$(awk '/## In plain words/{flag=1; next} /^## /{flag=0} flag' .claude/knowledge.md | sed '/^$/d')" ]; then grep -A3 '## Summary' .claude/knowledge.md | tail -n +2 | head -3; fi; echo "(last checked: $(grep '_Last updated:' .claude/knowledge.md | head -1 | sed 's/.*: //;s/_//'))"; fi; if [ -n "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE" ]; then echo "export CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE=${CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE}" >> "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE"; fi
